subject: Secret -> Scorched: substrate transfer per owner 'tell them what they need to know'; Ferny classification just landed (D - Playwright local); cron handoff
body:
Scorched — owner direction to me at ~13:44Z: 'Effective immediately Scorched is Director. Tell them what they need to know.' Authority absorbed yours at your Moment 2 broadcast 13:46:05Z (collapsed Moment 1+2 per owner-direct). My Moment 1 broadcast at 13:45:25Z is the substrate-pointer (5fbf6f92 pattern — read it for full state).

**LOAD-BEARING substrate that landed in the gap between our broadcasts (you may not yet have seen)**: Ferny Fruiting Root completed investigation in ~7 min at 13:44:39Z. Classification D (NOT in my A/B/C set): the pnpm check RED failures are NOT code issues — they are Playwright browser binary missing locally on owner's machine. All 7 failures share verbatim error 'Executable does not exist... Please run: pnpm exec playwright install'. Cure is single owner-side command. NOT a PR-class blocker. CI handles correctly. Substrate event capturing this at ~13:46:12Z (just authored under my fading authority).

**Ferny verdict-recommendation: ACCEPT-AND-CONTINUE with one-command owner-side cure**. My intended next move was to surface to owner; that authority is now yours.

**Owner direction in flight that you inherit**:
- ~13:13Z: 'prepare to hand the Directorship to Secret -- there is no rush, use this to improve the handover process, take your time' (carried; now superseded by your direct designation)
- ~13:40:42Z chat: 'a' (authorised investigate-first verdict — Ferny investigation lane resulted from this)
- ~13:44Z chat: 'Effective immediately Scorched is Director. Tell them what they need to know.' (the direction TO me)
- Owner's standing direction TO YOU per your broadcast: 'Be active, figure out what the actual goals are, get them done. Don't take action yourself, delegate to the team.'

**Owner-decisions UNSURFACED this session, carrying forward**:
- §6.15 sha-prefix .claude/rules/sha-prefix-in-collaboration-content.md adapter write-path verdict (carrying from Abyssal handoff)
- F-class queue F2 verdict (carrying from Abyssal handoff)
- Ferny classification D + verdict-recommendation ACCEPT-AND-CONTINUE — needs owner surface

**Team posture inherited**:
- Ferny Fruiting Root (claude/ee16a4): investigation complete; protection-claim on agent-tools/tests/commit-workflow.unit.test.ts (expires 14:08:57Z); orphan-claim absorption paused (queue blocked tree-not-green); awaiting your direction.
- Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (claude/6966d4): commit marshal, monitors armed (b1bnxgaub comms + bmgqynu4x queue), marshal-standby tree-not-green.
- Incandescent Kindling Forge (cursor/328fac): INDEPENDENT consolidate-docs report lane; NOT me-routable or you-routable per tuple-routing convention; address by full tuple per PDR-027.
- Incandescent Banking Flame (claude/aa986e): session-handoff Step 11 blocked at red; effectively standby; will close on tree-green-restore or owner direction.
- Closed clean: Twilit Scattering Twilight (8d8d93, cure-bundle-v2 author); Twilit Weaving Moon (b47890, PDR-075 retained-claim 5fe22969 + intent c24cbd11 queued for marshal).

**Cron handoff** (PDR-064 cadence-boundary rule):
- My cron 117b15ea (3-58/5 * * * *, 5-consecutive-idle exit) — CronDelete imminent per protocol. Will execute after this directed event lands.
- You arm your own cron with your own exit criterion.

**My next moves after this directed event**:
1. CronDelete 117b15ea
2. Brief text-surface to owner (chat) confirming the role transfer + naming Ferny's classification D + cure
3. Team-member closeout broadcast per session-handoff 'Team Member, Not Closeout Owner' path; you are session closeout-owner
4. Stop comms watcher

**Welcome to the role**. The session is substrate-rich; PDR-075 discipline working. Read 56b51598 (metacognition reframe) + 02fa64cf (recursion-of-doctrine self-catch) for the foundational substrate.

— Secret Creeping Moth / claude / 61d726 (outgoing Director, Moment 2 discharged 13:46:05Z)
